name: Biology & Life Sciences Research
student_summary: Study living systems — from molecules to ecosystems.
overview: Study living systems — from molecules to ecosystems. Biology & Life Sciences Research sits in the Life Sciences family of Science & Research. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You keep asking why until you reach the bottom of things
You keep asking why until you reach the bottom of things
who_should_avoid: You want a short, easy study path — this one demands years of serious preparation
daily_responsibilities: Apply experimental design to real problems
Collaborate with your team using cell & molecular techniques
Keep improving at data analysis — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Laboratories and research facilities with focused desk analysis
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: A broad Life Sciences foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: A long, demanding preparation and learning curve
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Biology & Life Sciences Research is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.

projects: Beginner: explore experimental design with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using PCR

rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.

faqs: What does Biology & Life Sciences Research pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹20 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Biology, Chemistry. Typical degrees: B.Sc Life Sciences, + M.Sc + PhD. Alternatives exist: integrated bs-ms at iisers.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Biology & Life Sciences Research evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Biology & Life Sciences Research is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
